prompt.positive:
A faithful image-to-video continuation of the provided flat raster financial interface. Start exactly from the complete first frame. Preserve the Russian title and explanatory text, every monetary value and date, the “Карты 15.8%” label, the donut-chart arc and ring, both checked credit-card rows, all icons, controls, spacing and panel geometry in exact visual registration, together with the original layout, crop and aspect ratio.

The content and state already shown in the first frame remain unchanged. During the clip, the complete interface holds still without interaction or data animation. By the final frames, the same financial screen remains fully settled in its original state.

Keep the camera locked and the original composition stable. Preserve the full main subject and all key scene elements in frame. No zoom, orbit, pan, tilt or reframing.

Maintain crisp stable typography, unchanged values, exact chart geometry, clean edges and smooth temporal consistency.
prompt.negative: scrolling, clicking, typing, hover changes, changed UI state, invented controls, altered monetary values, moving cards, changed chart values, redrawn donut series, chart rebuild, rewritten or unreadable Russian text, warped glyphs, changed dates, moving checkboxes, reframing, zoom, pan, flicker, morphing, blurred edges, motion artifacts
